title: Feruchemy
body:
# Welcome to The Cosmere!
[![](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/short_678466_downloads.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/feruchemy-cosmere/files) [![](https://img.shields.io/discord/828383636465123328.svg?color=purple&label=Discord&style=flat-square)](https://discord.gg/VjAGzeJvAu)

## Overview

The Cosmere is a universe devised by [Brandon Sanderson](https://www.amazon.com/Brandon-Sanderson/e/B001IGFHW6), encompassing many worlds, each with their own variation of magic.
This mod aims to bring Feruchemy (from the Mistborn series' planet named Scadrial) specifically to Minecraft, ideally in a way as lore-friendly as possible while still making sense for gameplay purposes.

Feruchemy is the End-Neutral art of Scadrial, where you get out what you put in! If you have access to [feruchemical abilities](https://coppermind.net/wiki/Feruchemy), that is.


## Inter-Mod Compatibilities

This mod is designed to have extra features if you also installed Allomancy and Hemalurgy.

**Allomancy** - The place where the powers of [allomancy and feruchemy](https://coppermind.net/wiki/Compounding) meet.

**Hemalurgy** - The [third](https://coppermind.net/wiki/Hemalurgy) metallic art of Scadrial...

 

 We also like these mods:

**(Required!) CuriosAPI** - Because it's so much cooler to wear your metalminds and show off how cool you look.

**JEI** - because recipes are forever plentiful and who wants to have to google them all the time.

**Patchouli** - because I love well done in-game wiki/guidance
